picks.narrative: Sonny Gray (4.04 xFIP) has a quality edge over Sean Sullivan (4.65), yet the market has over-discounted COL: model prices COL at 49.7% to win; Pinnacle implies 39.5% (+150) — a 10.3-point gap. This is reinforced by rest advantage: COL is the fresher team — the opponent played yesterday with 150 bullpen pitches in the last 3 days, a fatigue factor moneylines price more slowly than run lines. Key risk: Sonny Gray (4.04 xFIP) is the sharper starter — a 0.60-point gap that has to be overcome by COL's other model signals. This pick requires those signals to hold.
